title: NTA UGC NET June 2026 Online Form for JRF and Assistant Professor
short_information: National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the University Grant Commission UGC National Eligibility Test NET Assistant Professor / JRF June 2026 Examination online application Form 2026 will start from 29 April 2026 and the last date to apply will be 23 May 2026. candidates should read the NTA UGC NET June 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the NET / JRF exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Subject Details, information and other types of information and then apply. National Testing Agency (NTA) NTA UGC National Eligibility Test NET / JRF June 2026 NTA UGC NET JRF June 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General : 1150/- EWS / OBC : 600/- SC / ST / PH : 325/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, E Challan UGC NET JRF June 2026 Not:

tables.table_name: UGC NET JRF June 2026 Not: Age Limit Details JRF : Maximum Age : 31 Years NET : No Age Limit Age Relaxation Extra as Per UGC NET June 2026 Exam Rules
